sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n638" key="a)glao/dwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαό-δωρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bestowing splendid gifts</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Δημήτηρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl></cit>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:192" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">192</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:492" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">492</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
